page.content: In the current landscape of the hospitality and tourism sector, Accor SA is demonstrating a robust trajectory in its restaurant same-unit growth and meeting and event bookings. The year-on-year (YoY) change in restaurant performance reflects a favorable increase of 8.5%, underscoring the effective strategies implemented across various units.

lines.text: In the current landscape of the hospitality and tourism sector, Accor SA is demonstrating a robust trajectory in its restaurant
same-unit growth and meeting and event bookings. The year-on-year (YoY) change in restaurant performance reflects a
favorable increase of 8.5%, underscoring the effective strategies implemented across various units.

page.content: Notably, the market share has shown a positive trend, with the current status standing at 46.2%, indicating a strong foothold in the competitive environment. With an ambitious target for 2025 set at 17.0%, the company is poised to enhance its offerings and attract a broader clientele.

page.content: The corporate events segment, particularly in exhibitions, has also seen significant engagement, with a recorded booking amount of £1,500,000. Moreover, specific categories within corporate events, such as banquets, have yielded impressive numbers, with 650 bookings contributing to overall performance metrics. The strategic focus on diversifying offerings within the meeting and event sector is expected to sustain this growth trajectory, ensuring that Accor SA not only meets but exceeds its operational goals in the coming years.
